title: Festive Frenzy
description: A mod that adds various festive decorations and items, such as presents, baubles, tinsels and more!
body:
![Mod Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ec64c3dfe57bce7e03c78bc4c48e40fd8c273d8f.png)
## Description
Festive Frenzy is a fabric mod that adds various festive decorations and items, such as presents, baubles, tinsels and more.

## Features

<details>
  <summary>Items</summary>

  ![Food Items](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Now-this-is-crazy/Festive-Frenzy/refs/heads/main/gallery/food_sized.png)

  - Candy Pouches that are occasionaly dropped by hostile mobs
  - Candy Canes & Peppermint can be crafted into blocks
  - Sharpened Candy Cane, a sword-like weapon with unique visuals and stats
  - Wreath Chakram, a throwable weapon that pierces through enemies
  - Frostflake Cannons, which upon use shoot Frostflakes that cause Frostburn
 

</details>

<details>
  <summary>Blocks</summary>

  <details>
    <summary>
      Packed Snow Blocks
    </summary>

  ![Packed Snow Blocks](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Now-this-is-crazy/Festive-Frenzy/refs/heads/main/gallery/packed_snow_blocks_sized.png)

  - Regular, Polished, Brick & Chiseled Variant
  - Crafted using Snow Blocks
  
  </details>

  <details>
    <summary>
      Blue Ice Blocks
    </summary>

  ![Blue Ice Blocks](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Now-this-is-crazy/Festive-Frenzy/refs/heads/main/gallery/blue_ice_blocks_sized.png)

  - Regular, Polished, Brick & Chiseled Variant
  - Crafted using Blue Ice
  
  </details>

  <details>
    <summary>
      Gingerbread Blocks
    </summary>

  ![Gingerbread Blocks](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Now-this-is-crazy/Festive-Frenzy/refs/heads/main/gallery/gingerbread_blocks_sized.png)

  - Regular, Brick & Chiseled Variant
  - Door, Trapdoor, Button and Pressure Plate
  - Crafted using Gingerbread Dough
  
  </details>

</details>

<details>
  <summary>Decorations</summary>

<details>
  <summary>
    Presents
  </summary>

  ![Presents](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Now-this-is-crazy/Festive-Frenzy/refs/heads/main/gallery/presents_sized.png)

  - In all dye colors
  - 6 Additional unique variants
  - Crafted using Wool and String
  
</details>

  <details>
    <summary>
      Baubles
    </summary>

  ![Baubles](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Now-this-is-crazy/Festive-Frenzy/refs/heads/main/gallery/baubles_sized.png)

  - In all dye colors
  - Can be thrown
  - Crafted using an Iron Nugget, Glass and a Dye
  - Adding additional gunpowder gives it explosive properties
  
  </details>

  <details>
    <summary>
      Tinsels
    </summary>

  ![Tinsels](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Now-this-is-crazy/Festive-Frenzy/refs/heads/main/gallery/tinsels_sized.png)

  - In all dye colors
  - Crafted using wool
  
  </details>

  <details>
    <summary>
      Holly & Other
    </summary>

  ![Holly](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Now-this-is-crazy/Festive-Frenzy/refs/heads/main/gallery/holly_sized.png)

  - Short/Tall Frozen Grass, found in cold biomes
  - Holly, a plant found in Forests
  - Wreath, can be crafted with Holly
  - Fairy Lights, with 6 different variants
  - Star Decoration, that gives nearby blocks a shine
  
  </details>
  
</details>

<details>
  <summary>
    Misc
  </summary>

- Frostbite Effect that deals damage over time
- Gamerule "candyPouchDropChance": The percent chance of a hostile entity dropping a candy pouch
- Gamerule "layeredMeltingSnow": Whether or not snow layers should melt by layer or not
  
</details>

## SUGGESTIONS / ISSUES
Have something to suggest or found a bug? Either [join our Discord](https://discord.gg/Dmp2dbyNrs) or [make an issue in our GitHub](https://github.com/Now-this-is-crazy/Festive-Frenzy/issues).
